title: UFO Expert David Wilcock's 'Not Suicidal' Post Goes Viral After Death Shock
description: UFO researcher David Wilcock, 53, died in Colorado in an apparent self-inflicted incident during a reported mental health crisis. Days later, his 2022 post saying he was “not suicidal” went viral, drawing millions of views.

title: Vanishing Scientists: NASA Engineer and UFO Investigator Among Those Missing
description: The disappearance of a NASA engineer and a retired Air Force Major General involved in UFO investigations has sparked concerns about a pattern of unexplained deaths and vanishings among scientists linked to US space and nuclear programs. Authorities are investigating whether these incidents are coincidental or indicative of a more sinister cause.

title: David Wilcock’s Death: Tweet Of UFO Writer Claiming ‘Not Suicidal At All’ Goes Viral As 12 Scientists Go Missing
UFO expert and paranormal writer David Wilcock dies at home at age 53
description: David Wilcock, a prominent UFO researcher and bestselling author, has died at 53 at his Colorado home. Authorities say deputies responded to a 911 call before Wilcock died at the scene.

title: UFO expert David Wilcock’s old post goes viral after alleged suicide: 'I plan on living, not suicidal'
description: David Wilcock’s old post about planning to live and not being suicidal has surfaced online after the UFO researcher’s death.
